summary: All 5 acceptance criteria verified. Core repair behavior (logging, repair turn, repair success resume, repair failure blocking) was already implemented in agent_runner.ex and orchestrator.ex. 19 regression tests added across 3 test files covering missing artifact (:enoent), invalid JSON (Jason.DecodeError), invalid schema validation, and repair turn execution for plan, completion, and review artifact types. All 137 artifact-related tests pass with 0 failures. The only pre-existing test failures are smoke/status timing issues unrelated to this change.
